'''Corellia Digital''' was a large [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] manufacturer at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Secondary product lines included [[hologram platform]]s, used to display small decorative [[Hologram/Legends|holographic images]].

==Behind the scenes==
This company, along with the [[Bay-Suwe Combine]], is mentioned in the description of most hologram rewards in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{Mo}}
*{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{Mo}}
